name: Curried Pork with Sweet Potatos
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the sweet potatoes and cut into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Cut the pork into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Slice the onion thinly.
4. Mince the ginger root.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
6. Add the sweet potato slices and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove and set aside on paper towels to drain.
7. In the same skillet, add more oil if needed and heat.
8. Add the ginger root and onion, stirring for a few minutes until fragrant.
9. Add the pork and stir-fry until lightly browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
10. Stir in the soy sauce, salt (if using), and black pepper.
11. Pour in the chicken stock and curry powder, stirring to combine.
12. Return the fried sweet potato slices to the skillet.
13. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the pork is cooked through, about 30-40 minutes.
Note: The attribution line and additional metadata have been removed as per the instructions.
